title: Introduce Yourself
prompt: Introduce yourself by stating your name, age, and the class you are in.
hint: Use sentences like 'My name is...', 'I am ... years old', and 'I am in class ...'.
sample: My name is Ryan. I am nine years old. I am in class four.

ja.prompt: 名前、年齢、そして自分が所属しているクラスを紹介してください。
ja.hint: 'My name is...', 'I am ... years old', 'I am in class ...' のような文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: My name is Ryan. I am nine years old. I am in class four.

zh.prompt: 介紹你自己，說出你的名字、年齡和你所在的班級。
zh.hint: 使用句子如 'My name is...', 'I am ... years old', 'I am in class ...'。
zh.sample: My name is Ryan. I am nine years old. I am in class four.

title: Describe Your School
prompt: Describe your school by naming it and explaining why you like it.
hint: Mention the school's name and reasons such as learning new things or having good friends.
sample: I go to Green Valley School. I like my school very much because I learn many new things and have good friends.

ja.prompt: 学校の名前を言い、なぜ好きか説明してください。
ja.hint: 学校の名前や、新しいことを学べることや良い友達がいることなどの理由を述べましょう。
ja.sample: I go to Green Valley School. I like my school very much because I learn many new things and have good friends.

zh.prompt: 說出你的學校名稱並解釋你為什麼喜歡它。
zh.hint: 提到學校名稱和喜歡的原因，例如學到很多新東西或有好朋友。
zh.sample: I go to Green Valley School. I like my school very much because I learn many new things and have good friends.

title: Daily Routine in the Morning
prompt: Describe your morning routine including wake-up time and activities you do after waking up.
hint: Include the time you wake up and actions like brushing teeth, washing face, bathing, and getting ready.
sample: I wake up at seven o'clock. After waking up, I brush my teeth, wash my face, take a bath and get ready.

ja.prompt: 朝のルーティンを、起きる時間と起きてからすることを含めて説明してください。
ja.hint: 起きる時間や歯を磨く、顔を洗う、入浴する、準備をするなどの行動を含めましょう。
ja.sample: I wake up at seven o'clock. After waking up, I brush my teeth, wash my face, take a bath and get ready.

zh.prompt: 描述你的早晨例行公事，包括起床時間和起床後的活動。
zh.hint: 包含你起床的時間和刷牙、洗臉、洗澡、準備等行為。
zh.sample: I wake up at seven o'clock. After waking up, I brush my teeth, wash my face, take a bath and get ready.

title: Talk About Your Favorite Subject
prompt: Talk about your favorite school subject and explain why you like it.
hint: Name the subject and give reasons such as enjoying experiments or learning about nature.
sample: My favorite subject is science because I enjoy doing experiments and learning about nature.

ja.prompt: 好きな教科について話し、なぜ好きか説明してください。
ja.hint: 教科名を言い、実験が楽しいや自然について学ぶことが好きなどの理由を述べましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite subject is science because I enjoy doing experiments and learning about nature.

zh.prompt: 談談你最喜歡的學科並解釋你為什麼喜歡它。
zh.hint: 說出學科名稱並給出理由，例如喜歡做實驗或學習自然。
zh.sample: My favorite subject is science because I enjoy doing experiments and learning about nature.

title: Describe Your Favorite Hobby
prompt: Describe your favorite hobby and what you like to do in it.
hint: Mention the hobby and specific things you like to do, such as painting flowers and animals.
sample: My favorite hobby is painting. I like to paint flowers and animals.

ja.prompt: 好きな趣味とその中で何をするのが好きか説明してください。
ja.hint: 趣味を言い、花や動物を描くなど具体的な好きなことを述べましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite hobby is painting. I like to paint flowers and animals.

zh.prompt: 描述你最喜歡的嗜好以及你喜歡做的事情。
zh.hint: 說出嗜好和你喜歡做的具體事情，例如畫花和動物。
zh.sample: My favorite hobby is painting. I like to paint flowers and animals.

title: Talk About Your Pet
prompt: Talk about your pet by naming it and describing what you do together.
hint: Say your pet's name and activities like playing fetch or taking walks.
sample: I have a dog named Bruno. I play fetch and take him for walks.

ja.prompt: ペットの名前を言い、一緒にすることを説明してください。
ja.hint: ペットの名前や、ボール遊びや散歩に連れて行くなどの活動を言いましょう。
ja.sample: I have a dog named Bruno. I play fetch and take him for walks.

zh.prompt: 說說你的寵物，說出名字並描述你們一起做的事情。
zh.hint: 說出寵物的名字和活動，例如玩接球或帶牠散步。
zh.sample: I have a dog named Bruno. I play fetch and take him for walks.

title: Describe Your Favorite Sport
prompt: Describe your favorite sport and explain why you like it.
hint: Name the sport and reasons such as enjoying playing or liking a favorite player.
sample: My favorite sport is football because I like playing it the most. My favorite player is Leonardo Messi.

ja.prompt: 好きなスポーツについて説明し、なぜ好きかを述べてください。
ja.hint: スポーツの名前や、プレイするのが好き、好きな選手がいるなどの理由を言いましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite sport is football because I like playing it the most. My favorite player is Leonardo Messi.

zh.prompt: 描述你最喜歡的運動並解釋你為什麼喜歡它。
zh.hint: 說出運動名稱和理由，例如喜歡玩或有喜歡的球員。
zh.sample: My favorite sport is football because I like playing it the most. My favorite player is Leonardo Messi.

title: Talk About Your Best Friend
prompt: Talk about your best friend and explain why you like him or her.
hint: Name your best friend and describe qualities like being friendly, funny, and helpful.
sample: My best friend is Sam. I like him because he is friendly, funny, and always helps me.

ja.prompt: 親友について話し、なぜ好きか説明してください。
ja.hint: 親友の名前や、親切で面白くて助けてくれるなどの性格を述べましょう。
ja.sample: My best friend is Sam. I like him because he is friendly, funny, and always helps me.

zh.prompt: 談談你的好朋友並解釋你為什麼喜歡他。
zh.hint: 說出好朋友的名字和特質，例如友善、有趣、總是幫助我。
zh.sample: My best friend is Sam. I like him because he is friendly, funny, and always helps me.

title: Describe Your Weekend Activities
prompt: Describe what you usually do on weekends.
hint: Mention activities like playing, reading books, and going shopping with family.
sample: On weekends, I play, read books, and go shopping with my family.

ja.prompt: 週末に普段何をするか説明してください。
ja.hint: 遊ぶこと、本を読むこと、家族と買い物に行くことなどを言いましょう。
ja.sample: On weekends, I play, read books, and go shopping with my family.

zh.prompt: 描述你週末通常做什麼。
zh.hint: 提到玩耍、閱讀書籍和和家人一起購物等活動。
zh.sample: On weekends, I play, read books, and go shopping with my family.

title: Talk About Your Future Dream
prompt: Talk about what you want to be when you grow up and why.
hint: Name the job and reasons such as liking building things or solving problems.
sample: I want to be an engineer because I like building things and solving problems.

ja.prompt: 将来なりたいものとその理由を話してください。
ja.hint: 職業名や、物を作ることや問題を解決することが好きなどの理由を述べましょう。
ja.sample: I want to be an engineer because I like building things and solving problems.

zh.prompt: 談談你長大後想成為什麼以及為什麼。
zh.hint: 說出職業名稱和理由，例如喜歡建造東西或解決問題。
zh.sample: I want to be an engineer because I like building things and solving problems.
